data.text/markdown: 1.1 Monte Carlo Integration
1.2 Inverse CDF Sampling

(a)

||(F(x; x_0, \gamma) = \frac{1}{\pi} \arctan\left(\frac{x - x_0}{\gamma}\right) + \frac{1}{2}||) ||(u = \frac{1}{\pi} \arctan\left(\frac{x - x_0}{\gamma}\right) + \frac{1}{2}||) ||(u - \frac{1}{2} = \frac{1}{\pi} \arctan\left(\frac{x - x_0}{\gamma}\right)||) ||(\pi\left(u - \frac{1}{2}\right) = \arctan\left(\frac{x - x_0}{\gamma}\right)||) ||(\tan\left[\pi\left(u - \frac{1}{2}\right)\right] = \frac{x - x_0}{\gamma}||) ||(x - x_0 = \gamma \tan\left[\pi\left(u - \frac{1}{2}\right)\right]||) ||(F^{-1}(u) = x_0 + \gamma \tan\left[\pi\left(u - \frac{1}{2}\right)\right]||)
